intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把拖延感最强的几句读顺。

sentences.focus_zh: 注意 always spoil my holidays 的重音。

sentences.text: A friendly waiter taught me a few words of Italian.
sentences.focus_zh: 把 a few words of Italian 连起来读。

sentences.text: I read a few lines, but I did not understand a word.
sentences.focus_zh: but 后面稍停，突出 did not understand a word。

sentences.text: On the last day I made a big decision.
sentences.focus_zh: made a big decision 要读出一点郑重感。

sentences.text: I spent the whole day in my room, but I did not write a single card!
sentences.focus_zh: 注意 the whole day 和 not a single card 两个重点。
